brand: Built for journalists, by a journalist.
headline: RED SOX FIRE ALEX CORA, FIVE COACHES AFTER 10-17 START
snapshot: Boston made the day’s biggest sports move by firing manager Alex Cora and five members of the coaching staff after a disappointing 10-17 start, even after a 17-1 win over Baltimore.
key_storylines: The Red Sox dismissed Alex Cora and five coaches, turning Boston’s slow start into the top national sports story.
The Lakers visit the Rockets tonight with Los Angeles one win away from advancing.
The Hurricanes swept the Senators, while the Wild tied their series with the Stars on Matt Boldy’s overtime winner.
The Yankees extended their winning streak to eight games, while the Dodgers snapped the Cubs’ 10-game streak.

sections.title: TOP STORY
sections.headline: Red Sox Fire Alex Cora, Five Coaches After 10-17 Start
sections.snapshot: Boston moved aggressively after a poor opening month, dismissing Alex Cora and five staff members despite Saturday’s 17-1 win over the Orioles.
key_storylines: Chad Tracy was named interim manager.
The shakeup came after Boston opened 10-17.
The move resets the Red Sox dugout before the calendar even reaches May.
sections.why_it_matters: This is the kind of real-world event headline the GSR homepage should lead with: a major team decision, a clear news hook and immediate follow-up angles for editors.
story_angles: How quickly can Boston stabilize after a full staff shakeup?
What does the move say about ownership’s patience after a poor start?
Could this become the first major managerial domino of the 2026 MLB season?

sections.title: MLB
sections.headline: Red Sox Fire Cora; Yankees, Dodgers Make National Noise
sections.snapshot: Boston’s staff overhaul dominated the MLB news cycle, while the Yankees extended their winning streak and the Dodgers ended the Cubs’ 10-game run.
final_scores: Yankees extended winning streak to eight games
key_storylines: Boston fired manager Alex Cora and five coaches after a 10-17 start.
Garrett Crochet threw six shutout innings in Boston’s blowout win over Baltimore.
The Dodgers snapped the Cubs’ 10-game winning streak.
The Phillies ended their own 10-game skid in extra innings.
advanced_watch: Boston’s next-week response under interim manager Chad Tracy becomes a major trendline.
Yankees run prevention and lineup depth remain worth tracking during the winning streak.
Dodgers rebound power matters after halting one of baseball’s hottest teams.
story_angles: Red Sox clubhouse reset after Cora firing
Yankees streak becomes early AL East pressure point
Dodgers-Cubs result as a National League measuring-stick game

sections.title: NBA
sections.headline: Lakers Visit Rockets One Win From Advancing
sections.snapshot: Los Angeles goes into tonight’s road playoff game against Houston with a chance to close the series and move on.
key_storylines: The Lakers-Rockets game carries the strongest national headline because Los Angeles can advance.
Oklahoma City beat Phoenix by double digits.
New York handled Atlanta on the road.
Minnesota beat Denver by 16 in a major Western Conference result.
advanced_watch: Lakers late-game shot quality and half-court execution.
Thunder transition efficiency after a 121-point playoff output.
Timberwolves defensive pressure after holding Denver under 100.
story_angles: LeBron and the Lakers try to finish Houston
Thunder-Suns result shifts Western playoff pressure
Timberwolves defense creates a Denver problem

sections.title: NHL
sections.headline: Hurricanes Sweep Senators; Wild Tie Stars On Boldy OT Winner
sections.snapshot: Carolina completed a four-game sweep of Ottawa, while Minnesota pulled even with Dallas after Matt Boldy’s overtime goal.
key_storylines: Carolina advanced by sweeping Ottawa.
Matt Boldy scored late in overtime to tie the Wild-Stars series.
Pittsburgh avoided elimination against Philadelphia.
Colorado enters today with a chance to put major pressure on Los Angeles.
advanced_watch: Carolina’s special teams and closing structure after a sweep.
Minnesota’s shot-volume survival after Jesper Wallstedt’s 43-save game.
Pittsburgh’s veteran response with elimination pressure rising.
story_angles: Hurricanes look like an early Stanley Cup problem
